name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusionN ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES proc, state



TypeOK == /\ proc \in 1..N
          /\ state \in [proc -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == /\ proc = 1..N
        /\ state = [p \in proc |-> "idle"]

Next == \/ /\ proc' = proc
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![proc] = "idle"]
        \/ /\ proc' = proc
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![proc] = "trying"]
        \/ /\ proc' = proc
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![proc] = "critical"]
        \/ /\ proc' = proc
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![proc] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_proc

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES coordinator, participants, messages, state

Prepare = [msg |-> "Prepare", from |-> coordinator, to |-> participants]
VoteYes = [msg |-> "VoteYes", from |-> participants, to |-> coordinator]
VoteNo = [msg |-> "VoteNo", from |-> participants, to |-> coordinator]
Commit = [msg |-> "Commit", from |-> coordinator, to |-> participants]
Abort = [msg |-> "Abort", from |-> coordinator, to |-> participants]

Init == /\ coordinator \in Participants
        /\ participants \in 1..N
        /\ messages = {}
        /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]

PreparePhase == /\ messages' = messages \cup {Prepare}
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Prepare"]

VotePhase == /\ messages' = messages \cup {VoteYes}
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Vote"]

CommitPhase == /\ messages' = messages \cup {Commit}
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Commit"]

AbortPhase == /\ messages' = messages \cup {Abort}
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Abort"]

Next == \/ PreparePhase
        \/ VotePhase
        \/ CommitPhase
        \/ AbortPhase

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinator, participants, messages, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

Next == \/ /\ size < K
          /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
          /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
          /\ size' = size + 1
          /\ head' = head
        \/ /\ size > 0
          /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
          /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
          /\ size' = size - 1
          /\ tail' = tail
        \/ /\ size = K
          /\ q' = q
          /\ head' = head
          /\ tail' = tail
          /\ size' = size

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Follower"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor \cup {s}
        \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        \/ /\ state' = state
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
      \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSet, NULL

VARIABLES store

Keys == {"k1", "k2", "k3"}  \* Example finite key set
Values == {"v1", "v2", "v3"} \* Example finite value set

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        \/ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]
          /\ Keys \in FiniteSet
          /\ Values \in FiniteSet

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, values, ballots, promises, accepted, chosen

Init == /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> <<FALSE, 0, 0, 0>>]
        /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0, 0>>]
        /\ values = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
        /\ ballots = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
        /\ promises = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
        /\ accepted = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
        /\ chosen = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]

Prepare(p) == /\ proposers[p][1] = FALSE
              /\ proposers[p][2] = FALSE
              /\ proposers[p][3] = FALSE
              /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = <<TRUE, 0, 0>>]
              /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> <<FALSE, 0, 0, 0>>]
              /\ values' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
              /\ ballots' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
              /\ promises' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
              /\ accepted' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
              /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]

Promise(p) == /\ proposers[p][1] = TRUE
              /\ proposers[p][2] = FALSE
              /\ proposers[p][3] = FALSE
              /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> <<TRUE, proposers[p][2], proposers[p][3], acceptors[i][4]>>]
              /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = <<TRUE, proposers[p][2], proposers[p][3]>>]
              /\ values' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
              /\ ballots' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
              /\ promises' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
              /\ accepted' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
              /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]

Accept(p) == /\ proposers[p][1] = TRUE
             /\ proposers[p][2] = TRUE
             /\ proposers[p][3] = FALSE
             /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = <<TRUE, TRUE, proposers[p][3]>>]
             /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> <<TRUE, proposers[p][2], proposers[p][3], acceptors[i][4]>>]
             /\ values' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
             /\ ballots' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
             /\ promises' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
             /\ accepted' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
             /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]

Chosen(p) == /\ proposers[p][1] = TRUE
             /\ proposers[p][2] = TRUE
             /\ proposers[p][3] = TRUE
             /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = <<TRUE, TRUE, proposers[p][3]>>]
             /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> <<TRUE, proposers[p][2], proposers[p][3], acceptors[i][4]>>]
             /\ values' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
             /\ ballots' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
             /\ promises' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
             /\ accepted' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
             /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<TRUE, proposers[p][3]>>]

Propose(p, v) == /\ proposers[p][1] = FALSE
                 /\ proposers[p][2] = FALSE
                 /\ proposers[p][3] = FALSE
                 /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = <<TRUE, proposers[p][2], proposers[p][3]>>]
                 /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> <<FALSE, 0, 0, 0>>]
                 /\ values' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<TRUE, v>>]
                 /\ ballots' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
                 /\ promises' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
                 /\ accepted' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
                 /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]

AcceptValue(p, v) == /\ proposers[p][1] = FALSE
                     /\ proposers[p][2] = FALSE
                     /\ proposers[p][3] = FALSE
                     /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = <<TRUE, proposers[p][2], proposers[p][3]>>]
                     /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> <<FALSE, 0, 0, 0>>]
                     /\ values' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
                     /\ ballots' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
                     /\ promises' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
                     /\ accepted' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<TRUE, v>>]
                     /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]

Choose(p, v) == /\ proposers[p][1] = FALSE
                /\ proposers[p][2] = FALSE
                /\ proposers[p][3] = FALSE
                /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = <<TRUE, proposers[p][2], proposers[p][3]>>]
                /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> <<FALSE, 0, 0, 0>>]
                /\ values' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
                /\ ballots' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
                /\ promises' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
                /\ accepted' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<FALSE, 0>>]
                /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..M |-> <<TRUE, v>>]

Next == \/ \E p \in 1..M : Prepare(p)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M : Promise(p)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M : Accept(p)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M : Chosen(p)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E v \in V : Propose(p, v)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E v \in V : AcceptValue(p, v)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E v \in V : Choose(p, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, values, ballots, promises, accepted, chosen>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries, Timeout
VARIABLES acked, retransmits, sent, tick, timer, chunks

Init ==
    /\ chunks = SubSeq(File, 1, ChunkSize) \* Divide file into chunks
    /\ sent = {} \* No chunks have been sent yet
    /\ acked = {} \* No chunks have been acknowledged yet
    /\ retransmits = [i \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> 0] \* No retransmissions yet
    /\ timer = [i \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> 0] \* No timers yet
    /\ tick = 0 \* Start at tick 0

SendChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..Len(chunks) \* Valid chunk index
    /\ i \notin sent \* Chunk has not been sent yet
    /\ sent' = sent \cup {i} \* Mark chunk as sent
    /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![i] = 0] \* Reset retransmission count
    /\ timer' = [timer EXCEPT ![i] = tick + Timeout] \* Set timeout
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, acked, tick>>

RetransmitChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..Len(chunks) \* Valid chunk index
    /\ i \in sent \* Chunk has been sent
    /\ i \notin acked \* Chunk has not been acknowledged
    /\ retransmits[i] < MaxRetries \* Retransmission count below maximum
    /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![i] = retransmits[i] + 1] \* Increment retransmission count
    /\ timer' = [timer EXCEPT ![i] = tick + Timeout] \* Reset timeout
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, acked, sent, tick>>

ReceiveAck(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..Len(chunks) \* Valid chunk index
    /\ i \in sent \* Chunk has been sent
    /\ i \notin acked \* Chunk has not been acknowledged
    /\ acked' = acked \cup {i} \* Mark chunk as acknowledged
    /\ timer' = [timer EXCEPT ![i] = 0] \* Reset timer
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, retransmits, tick>>

Tick ==
    /\ tick' = tick + 1 \* Increment tick
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits, timer>>

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) : SendChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) : RetransmitChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) : ReceiveAck(i)
    \/ Tick

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits, timer, tick>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ chunks \in Seq(Seq(1..255)) \* Chunks are sequences of bytes
    /\ sent \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks) \* Sent is a subset of chunk indices
    /\ acked \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks) \* Acknowledged is a subset of chunk indices
    /\ retransmits \in [1..Len(chunks) -> 0..MaxRetries] \* Retransmission counts are integers
    /\ timer \in [1..Len(chunks) -> 0..Timeout] \* Timers are integers
    /\ tick \in 0..Timeout \* Tick is an integer
